jobs.brief_description: Senior Machine Learning Engineers 🤖🚀 - Are you driven by building intelligent systems that power analytics, machine learning, and AI‑enabled decision‑making? Your work will span AI platforms, analytical systems, LLM‑enabled tools, data pipelines, microservices, and cloud‑based deployments. You’ll guide technical delivery, mentor engineers, and ensure robust engineering practices across multiple projects. Key Responsibilities: Lead the development of software components supporting analytics, machine learning, LLM applications, and AI‑driven workflows Architect back-end services, APIs, and data models that support AI and large‑scale analytical solutions Build and maintain data pipelines, feature stores, inference engines, and model‑serving systems Integrate ML models and LLMs into production environments using scalable, reliable patterns Implement testing, monitoring, and governance processes for production AI systems Translate analytical and client requirements into system designs and actionable engineering work Collaborate across advisory, actuarial, analytics, and technical teams to embed AI within broader consulting projects What You Need to Succeed: 🎓 MSc in Computer Science (or a related field) Strong grounding in algorithms, systems design, software engineering principles, mathematics & probability Expertise in Python , with additional experience in JavaScript/Node.js advantageous Experience deploying production systems using PyTorch , Docker, Kubernetes, REST APIs, and microservices Ability to design scalable back-end architecture and distributed systems Familiarity with Git/GitHub, CI/CD automation, and Linux/Windows environments Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP) advantageous For more exciting IT vacancies, please visit: https://www.networkrecruitmentinternational.com/it I also specialise in recruiting in the following: Full Stack, Backend & Senior Engineering Roles Python, Java, PHP & .NET Development DevOps, Cloud & Infrastructure Engineering Data Engineering, Analytics & Architecture Product, Platform & Enterprise Technology Roles If you have not had any response in two weeks, please consider the vacancy application unsuccessful. jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.summary: An exciting opportunity for a highly skilled Senior Machine Learning Engineer to lead the design and delivery of advanced software systems enabling analytics, AI, and LLM-driven solutions. This role c
jobs.brief_description: An exciting opportunity for a highly skilled Senior Machine Learning Engineer to lead the design and delivery of advanced software systems enabling analytics, AI, and LLM-driven solutions. This role combines hands‑on engineering, technical leadership, and collaboration with consultants, data scientists, and clients.
jobs.detail_description: Our client is a respected analytics-led consulting firm delivering innovative software, data, and AI solutions. As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer , you will architect, build, and operationalise systems that power data science, machine learning, and LLM use cases. You will take ownership from concept to production, guide junior engineers, and ensure engineering best practices across projects. The role requires strong software engineering capability, end‑to‑end delivery ownership, and the ability to translate analytical and business requirements into scalable technical solutions. Key Responsibilities: Design, develop, and deliver software components for analytics, ML, and AI/LLM‑enabled systems. Build back-end services, APIs, data models, and scalable inference pipelines. Develop and maintain data pipelines, feature stores, and model‑serving interfaces. Ensure that codebases are maintainable, well‑documented, tested, and production‑ready. Lead end‑to‑end solution delivery, including design, testing, deployment, and optimisation. Mentor junior engineers and enforce engineering best practices. Participate in client engagements and collaborate with cross‑functional teams. Act as a trusted technical advisor to consultants and clients. Job Experience & Skills Required: Education: MSc in Computer Science or a related field (non‑negotiable). Strong grounding in software engineering, algorithms, programming principles, mathematics, and probability. PhD in AI/ML or distributed systems advantageous. Experience: Minimum 2+ years of professional software engineering experience. Proven contributions to production‑grade systems across the full development lifecycle. Experience in analytics, data science, ML, or AI‑enabled environments beneficial. Ability to translate analytical and business requirements into technical system designs. Consulting or client‑facing experience advantageous. Technical Skills: Programming: Python (required) and SQL. JavaScript frameworks (Next.js and React) advantageous. Frameworks & Tools: Node.js, PyTorch, Docker, and Kubernetes. Data & Integration: REST APIs, microservices, and message queues. DevOps: Git/GitHub and CI/CD pipelines. Systems: Windows & Linux. Cloud (advantageous): AWS, Azure, or GCP. Competencies: Strong problem‑solving and system‑thinking ability. Ability to design scalable, secure, and maintainable systems. Excellent communication skills with technical and non‑technical stakeholders. High ownership, accountability, and professional judgement. Apply now! For more exciting IT vacancies, please visit: www.networkrecruitmentinternational.com I also specialise in recruiting in the following: Software Developers Data Analysts IT Support Technicians Test Analysts DevOps Engineers If you have not had any response in two weeks, please consider the vacancy application unsuccessful. jobs.location: Western Cape > Cape Town: Southern Suburbs
jobs.summary: Step into a high‑impact role where your passion for clean, reliable data truly matters. As a Data Analyst, you’ll be the engine behind flawless data flows, collecting, transforming, and validati
jobs.brief_description: Step into a high‑impact role where your passion for clean, reliable data truly matters. As a Data Analyst, you’ll be the engine behind flawless data flows, collecting, transforming, and validating information that powers critical business decisions. You’ll work hands‑on with SQL, collaborate across teams, and help shape our transition into a modern Azure data environment. If you thrive on problem‑solving, love making messy data make sense, and want to be at the heart of analytics excellence, this role is your perfect next move.
jobs.detail_description: Key Responsibilities: Data Collection and Ingestion: Collect data from multiple internal and external sources (files, APIs, manual submissions, and system exports). Prepare and ingest data into SQL databases using defined processes. Support migration of data workflows to Azure-based services. Data Processing and Transformation: Cleanse, standardise, and transform raw data into structured formats. Map incoming data to existing database schemas and business definitions. Apply business rules and transformation logic consistently. Data Quality and Validation: Validate data for accuracy, completeness, consistency, and timeliness. Identify and resolve data quality issues at source. Maintain validation checks and reconciliation processes. Flag anomalies, trends, or risks in incoming datasets. Database and Data Management: Query, validate, and maintain data in SQL databases. Assist with schema updates, documentation, and data dictionary maintenance. Ensure data integrity across historical and incremental loads. Documentation and Process Improvement: Document data sources, mappings, transformation rules, and validation logic. Continuously improve data ingestion and data quality processes. Support automation initiatives to reduce manual data handling. Stakeholder Support: Work with analysts, reporting teams, and business users to resolve data queries. Provide trusted datasets for reports, dashboards, and decision-making. Job Experience and Skills Required: Degree in Information Systems, Data Analytics, Computer Science, or a related field 1–4 years’ experience in a data, analytics, or systems support role Strong SQL knowledge (queries, joins, validation, and reconciliations) Familiarity with ETL / ELT processes and data pipelines. Apply now! jobs.summary: Exciting opportunity for a skilled Data Scientist passionate about turning complex data into meaningful strategic value.
jobs.brief_description: Exciting opportunity for a skilled Data Scientist passionate about turning complex data into meaningful strategic value.
jobs.detail_description: Our client is seeking a highly skilled Data Scientist to extract, analyse, and transform large datasets into actionable business insights. In this role, you will work with multiple data sources, apply advanced statistical methodologies, build predictive models, and use modern data technologies to drive strategic decision-making. You will also contribute to database structuring, engage with internal and external stakeholders, and communicate insights across both technical and non‑technical audiences. This role combines statistical expertise, programming capability, business acumen, and the ability to translate data into real organisational value. Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Engineering, Actuarial Science, or a related field Fluency in Python, SQL, and R (core requirement) 4 years of experience in data science, data warehousing, or modelling environments Strong understanding of software languages and infrastructure Experience working with, analysing, and modelling large datasets Insurance industry exposure and actuarial understanding are highly advantageous Beneficial programming knowledge: C# .NET, C, C++, and Visual Basic Apply now! For more exciting IT vacancies, please visit: www.networkrecruitmentinternational.com I also specialise in recruiting in the following: Software Developers/Engineers/Architects Data Analytics Specialists PM/BA/Scrum Masters DevOps and Infrastructure Experts If you have not had any response in two weeks, please consider the vacancy application unsuccessful. Your profile will be kept on our database for any other suitable roles / positions. For more information contact: Samkelisiwe Makhanye Recruitment Consultant 011 622 9526

jobs.title: Senior Data Analyst (Pricing)
jobs.summary: I am recruiting for a Senior Manager: Product Performance Analysis & Costing to join a well-established financial services environment. This role suits a commercially minded analytics leader who enjoy
jobs.brief_description: I am recruiting for a Senior Manager: Product Performance Analysis & Costing to join a well-established financial services environment. This role suits a commercially minded analytics leader who enjoys working at the intersection of data, finance, pricing, and product performance, while managing and developing a team of analysts.
jobs.detail_description: The successful candidate will play a key role in delivering high-quality analytics, financial models, and insight that supports sustainable, transparent, and profitable product performance. Role Overview: You will be responsible for leading a small team of analysts and implementing analytics solutions across the full data lifecycle — from data preparation and modelling through to insight delivery and executive reporting. The role works closely with finance and operational teams to guide pricing, costing structures, and overall product financial performance. Key Responsibilities: Manage and maintain the analytics database and SQL models Build and enhance financial models for product performance and pricing Prepare, analyse, and present product performance insights for management and financial reporting Analyse economic factors and risks impacting product pricing Conduct claims and performance analysis on financial products Lead, mentor, and develop junior analysts Prepare budgets and fund-related financial data Support audits and external valuators with data preparation and queries Contribute to finance and product performance committees Maintain documentation and continuously improve analytical processes Automate monthly reporting processes with BI support Deliver ad hoc analysis to support adjacent teams Essential Requirements (Non-Negotiable): Degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, or another quantitative discipline 5+ years’ experience in analytics, financial modelling, or product performance analysis Proven management or team leadership experience Strong SQL / database experience Advanced Excel skills Exposure to Python and/or R for statistical or analytical modelling Experience working with financial services, insurance, or financial products (advantageous) Strong communication and presentation skills for senior stakeholders High attention to detail and strong commercial thinking Key Competencies: Strong analytical and logical problem-solving ability Comfortable working with minimal supervision Able to perform under pressure and meet reporting deadlines High integrity and accountability Strong collaboration and team leadership skills Apply Now! For more information contact: Raees Sadek IT Recruitment Researcher 011 622 9526
